verdict: relic is COSMOLOGICAL-scale (FM3-1) and causally FROZEN super-horizon (E3b, gate) -- but its equation of state is w_eff=-0.43 (~ -1/3, texture/global-monopole), NOT cold (w=0). Under flat (sub-horizon) evolution it coarsens away (n_def ~ t^-1.75). So it is NOT a cold, clustering CDM-like component.
